target_audience: AI builders, senior engineers, and technical founders who value craft and can tell premium from generic.
avoid: cheap AI clipart and uncanny stock renders

typography_preferences.direction: Heavy, confident grotesque for display; clean monospace or technical sans for supporting/UI text.
typography_preferences.notes: Type should feel engineered and deliberate. Tight tracking on display. No default geometric sans used as a crutch.

color_preferences.notes: Black and white foundation with a single high-energy red accent used sparingly for emphasis. Contrast is a feature, not an afterthought.

production_constraints: Logo and marks must be legible at favicon / app-icon size
Identity must work in one color (single ink) and on black
Web assets must hold hierarchy and contrast on mobile
Apparel: hold to 3-4 spot colors and read on black garments
quality_bar: Premium creative-technology standard: every asset should look intentional, engineered, and impossible to mistake for default AI output. If it could belong to any AI startup, it isn't done.
